title: UNICAF Scholarships for Online Degrees at UK Universities
description: Do you want to pursue an internationally recognized Bachelor, Master’s, PHD Degrees offered by universities in the UK, but at a fraction of the cost? All courses are offered 100% online and available for a wide range of studies. More than $100 million worth of UNICAF scholarships have been awarded to over 80,000 students around the world so far. That could be you,apply today!
